indications.text:
LOSEASONIQUE® is indicated for use by females of reproductive potential to prevent
pregnancy.

LoSeasonique® (levonorgestrel/ethinyl estradiol tablets and ethinyl estradiol tablets) is indicated
for use by women to prevent pregnancy.
